fields.label: Headline
fields.name: hero_headline
fields.instructions: May include simple inline HTML such as … for the lighter weight.

fields.label: Hero background image
fields.name: hero_image
fields.instructions: Full-bleed background behind the hero text (desktop and tablet).

fields.label: Mobile hero image
fields.name: hero_image_mobile
fields.instructions: Shown above the heading on mobile only (max 768px). Improves Google Ads conversion and is the mobile LCP image. Leave blank to keep the background image on mobile too.

fields.label: Call-back Gravity Form ID
fields.name: hero_form_id
fields.instructions: The ID of the hero "Request a call back" Gravity Form.

fields.label: Headline
fields.name: services_headline
fields.instructions: May include simple inline HTML such as … for the lighter weight.

sub_fields.label: Button text
sub_fields.name: cta_text
sub_fields.instructions: Defaults to "Get a quote" if left blank.

sub_fields.label: Button link
sub_fields.name: cta_link
sub_fields.instructions: Defaults to the contact section if left blank.

fields.label: Stat number
fields.name: about_stat_number
fields.instructions: Animated count, eg "20". A "+" is added automatically.

fields.name: about_headline
fields.instructions: May include simple inline HTML such as … for the lighter weight.

fields.instructions: Small label overlaid on the image, eg "Made in Perth".

fields.label: Secondary text link
fields.name: built_secondary_cta
fields.instructions: Shown as an underlined "Call us" style link.

fields.label: Statement

and … (bold renders in bronze).

sub_fields.label: Placeholder?
sub_fields.name: is_placeholder
sub_fields.instructions: Shows the dashed "replace" flag. Turn off for real reviews.

fields.label: Headline

sub_fields.label: Link (optional)

sub_fields.instructions: Wraps the value in a link, eg tel:0432175483, mailto:hello@example.com or https://...

fields.name: contact_form_id
fields.instructions: The ID of the "Request a free quote" Gravity Form.
